overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a character riding a giant bird through dark mountainous terrain at night. The flight navigates narrow rocky canyons, passes ancient stone ruins and a large dead tree, then ascends into open misty skies before descending through dense fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep mountain canyon with rocky walls

events.description: passing near a lit cave entrance or torch-lit structure on the canyon wall

agents.ego_description: character riding a giant bird mount, gliding through the narrow canyon with steady wing beats

entered.detail: tall dark rock face forming the canyon boundary
tall dark rock face forming the canyon boundary
small warm light sources visible in the distance below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dark flight through a narrow mountain canyon. The giant bird navigates between tall cliff walls with minimal sky visibility, passing occasional torch-lit areas on the rock faces.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient ruins with dead tree on cliff edge

events.description: emerging from narrow canyon into area with ancient stone ruins and large dead tree
bird banks sharply to navigate around the dead tree and ruins

agents.ego_description: maneuvering the bird mount around obstacles, banking left to avoid the large dead tree

entered.detail: weathered stone structures and broken walls
large twisted dead tree with bare branches silhouetted against sky
tall ruined stone tower visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The bird emerges from the tight canyon into a more open area featuring ancient stone ruins and a prominent dead tree. The camera banks around these obstacles as the sky becomes partially visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain vista with scattered ruins

events.description: ascending above the ruins into open sky with wide mountain vistas
entering light mist and fog as altitude decreases toward the valley

agents.ego_description: soaring upward into open air then beginning descent into the misty valley below

entered.detail: starry sky with clouds becoming visible as the bird ascends
wooden platforms and beams attached to the cliffside
valley below covered in low-lying fog and mist

segments.scene_description: The bird ascends into open sky revealing a vast mountain vista under starlight. The scene transitions from clear air to increasing mist as the flight descends toward a fog-covered valley with wooden scaffolding visible on the cliffs.

events.description: visibility drops significantly as the bird enters dense fog bank

agents.ego_description: descending through thick fog with reduced visibility, navigating by distant lights

entered.detail: thick white fog obscuring visibility and ground details
dim orange light visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the descent into a dense fog bank that obscures the landscape. Visibility is severely reduced to just the immediate surroundings, with only faint distant lights visible through the mist as the bird continues its flight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight that begins in the claustrophobic depths of a mountain canyon and gradually ascends into a starlit vista before plunging into a dense fog. It begins by weaving through narrow cliff walls illuminated by occasional torches, where the sky is nearly hidden by towering rock faces. As the bird emerges from the tight passage, the environment opens up to reveal ancient stone ruins and a prominent dead tree, with the camera banking around these landmarks as the horizon expands. The scene then shifts into a steep ascent toward a vast mountain vista under a starry sky, before the air thickens into a mist that accompanies a descent toward wooden scaffolding on the cliffs. Finally, the flight dives into a heavy fog bank that obscures the landscape, reducing visibility to the immediate surroundings and a few faint, distant lights.
